visuals.title: DNS Hierarchical Namespace Tree
visuals.description: Visual diagram for DNS Hierarchical Namespace Tree
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      </polygon>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Name Services</text>
  
  <!-- Client -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Client
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Name Service -->
  <rect x="170" y="120" width="80" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Name Service
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Server -->
  <rect x="290" y="70" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Server
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Request Arrow -->
  <path d="M130,90 C155,100 155,120 130,130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="155" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Query
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Response Arrow -->
  <path d="M250,130 C275,120 275,100 250,90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="265" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Response
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- DNS Example -->
  <rect x="120" y="200" width="180" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Example: DNS Lookup
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    "google.com" → 172.217.16.46
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
